message.content:
You are a TypeScript type safety reviewer. Review the InvoiceCashbackPoints screen's type definitions and usage.

CONTEXT:
- Project uses TypeScript with strict mode
- CashbackInvoiceItem interface defines iconColor and iconColorShape as PropsTokenColorsCore
- The migration should use design system token names (strings like 'BRAND_BASE_01') not hex colors

YOUR TASK:
1. Read src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx
2. Read src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/models/index.ts
3. Verify type safety:
   - The invoiceList() function returns CashbackInvoiceItem[]
   - The items passed to view match the expected type
   - iconColor and iconColorShape use valid PropsTokenColorsCore token names
   - No implicit any types
   - No type assertions that could hide issues
4. Compare with InvoiceCashbackOnboarding (at src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/index.tsx) to verify consistency

Report any type safety issues or inconsistencies found.

content.text: Let me also check the InvoiceCashbackOnboarding models to ensure consistency, and verify the view file types.

file.content:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  InputBox,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import React, { FC } from 'react';
import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import { formatCurrencyBR, getFormattedPoints } from '../../utils/functions';
import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';

const InvoiceCashbackPointsView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  handleContinue,
  points,
  formattedPrice,
  handleChangeReais,
  handleChangePoints,
  handleUseAll,
  pointsValue,
  reaisValue,
  convertionValue,
  pointsError,
  reaisError,
  items,
  pointsQuantity,
  handleModalizeContinue,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  handleSelectEvent,
  height,
  width,
  isLoadingParameterization,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title="Cashback na fatura"
      hasRightIcon
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
        <Text
          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
          type="headingMDL"
          mt="smaller"
        >
          Defina quanto cashback quer na sua fatura
        </Text>

        <Box direction mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">
          <Text type="paragraphMD" mr="quark">
            Pontos disponíveis:
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mr="quark">
            {getFormattedPoints(points || 0)}
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphMD">({formattedPrice})</Text>
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em pontos"
          placeholder="0"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="number-pad"
          value={pointsValue}
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_pontos')}
          onChangeText={handleChangePoints}
          error={pointsError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
          textRight="Usar todos"
          onPressTextRight={handleUseAll}
        />

        <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
          <Icon
            name="icon-switch-vertical"
            size="xxs"
            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
            mr="nano"
            ml="nano"
          />
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em reais"
          placeholder="R$0,00"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_valor')}
          value={reaisValue}
          onChangeText={handleChangeReais}
          error={reaisError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
        />
        {isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
          </Box>
        )}
        {!isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Text type="paragraphMD">
              Cada {pointsQuantity || '0'} pontos valem {convertionValue || formatCurrencyBR(0)} de
              cashback na fatura.
            </Text>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
        <Button
          disabled={
            pointsValue === '' ||
            reaisValue === '' ||
            pointsValue === '0' ||
            reaisValue === '0' ||
            pointsError ||
            reaisError
          }
          text="Continuar"
          mt="large"
          mb="small"
          onPress={handleContinue}
          testID="invoice-cashback-button"
        />
      </Box>
      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleModalizeContinue} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackPointsView;

content.text: Now I have all the information needed to complete the type safety review. Let me also check if there's a ListTextIcon component to understand how items are consumed.

Now I have a complete picture. Let me compile the type safety review report.

---

## Type Safety Review Report: InvoiceCashbackPoints Screen

### Files Reviewed

1. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx`
2. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/models/index.ts`
3. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/index.tsx`
4. `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/models/index.ts`

---

### Type Safety Analysis

#### 1. CashbackInvoiceItem Interface (Both Screens)

**Definition (InvoiceCashbackPoints/models/index.ts, lines 38-45):**
```typescript
export interface CashbackInvoiceItem {
  text?: string;
  type: TextIconType;
  icon: PropsIconsNameCore;
  iconColor: PropsTokenColorsCore;
  iconColorShape: PropsTokenColorsCore;
  description: string;
}
```

**Verdict: CORRECTLY TYPED**

- `iconColor` and `iconColorShape` are typed as `PropsTokenColorsCore` (design system token union type)
- Both properties use valid design system token names (`'BRAND_BASE_01'` and `'INTENSE_COLOR_01'`)

#### 2. Token Name Validation

The tokens used in the `invoiceList()` function are valid members of `PropsTokenColorsCore`:

| Token Used | Present in PropsTokenColorsCore | Line in type.colors.d.ts |
|------------|--------------------------------|--------------------------|
| `'BRAND_BASE_01'` | Yes | Line 224 |
| `'INTENSE_COLOR_01'` | Yes | Line 234 |

**Verdict: PASS - All token names are valid design system tokens, not hex colors.**

#### 3. invoiceList() Return Type

**InvoiceCashbackPoints (line 92-125):**
```typescript
const invoiceList = (): CashbackInvoiceItem[] => {
  return [
    {
      type: 'default',
      icon: 'icon-switch-vertical',
      iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
      iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
      description: `Cada ${pointsQuantity.toLocaleString('pt-br')} pontos valem ${convertionValue} no cashback`,
    },
    // ... 3 more items with identical token usage
  ];
};
```

**Verdict: PASS**
- Explicit return type annotation `CashbackInvoiceItem[]`
- All required properties provided (`type`, `icon`, `iconColor`, `iconColorShape`, `description`)
- No implicit `any` types
- No type assertions

#### 4. Items Assignment and View Props

**InvoiceCashbackPoints (line 133):**
```typescript
const items: CashbackInvoiceItem[] = invoiceList();
```

**InvoiceCashbackViewProps (line 25):**
```typescript
items: CashbackInvoiceItem[];
```

**Verdict: PASS - Type consistency maintained from function return through view props.**

#### 5. Design System Component Compatibility

The `ListTextIcon` component from `@semparar/design-system-app` expects `PropsListTextIconDetail[]` for its items:

```typescript
interface PropsListTextIconDetail {
  iconColor?: PropsTokenColorsCore;
  iconColorShape?: PropsTokenColorsCore;
  // ...
}
```

**Observation:** The `CashbackInvoiceItem` interface is compatible with `PropsListTextIconDetail`:
- Both use `PropsTokenColorsCore` for color tokens
- `CashbackInvoiceItem` uses `icon` while `PropsListTextIconDetail` uses `icon` (same)

**Verdict: PASS - Types are structurally compatible.**

---

### Consistency Comparison: InvoiceCashbackPoints vs InvoiceCashbackOnboarding

| Aspect | InvoiceCashbackPoints | InvoiceCashbackOnboarding | Status |
|--------|----------------------|---------------------------|--------|
| CashbackInvoiceItem interface | Identical | Identical | CONSISTENT |
| iconColor token | `'BRAND_BASE_01'` | `'BRAND_BASE_01'` | CONSISTENT |
| iconColorShape token | `'INTENSE_COLOR_01'` | `'INTENSE_COLOR_01'` | CONSISTENT |
| invoiceList return type | `CashbackInvoiceItem[]` | `CashbackInvoiceItem[]` | CONSISTENT |
| Type imports | PropsTokenColorsCore from design-system-app | PropsTokenColorsCore from design-system-app | CONSISTENT |

**Verdict: Both screens use identical type definitions and token values.**

---

### Potential Issues Found

#### 1. Duplicate Interface Definition (Minor)

The `CashbackInvoiceItem` interface is defined separately in three locations:
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/models/index.ts`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/models/index.ts`
- `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/models/index.ts`

**Risk:** If the interface needs updating, all three locations must be modified to stay in sync.

**Recommendation:** Consider extracting `CashbackInvoiceItem` to a shared models file (e.g., `src/services/models/cashback.ts`) and importing from there.

#### 2. Unused Property in CashbackInvoiceItem

The `text?: string` property is defined but never used in either screen's `invoiceList()` function.

**Risk:** Low. This is a minor redundancy, not a type safety issue.

---

### Summary

| Check | Result |
|-------|--------|
| CashbackInvoiceItem properly typed | PASS |
| iconColor uses PropsTokenColorsCore | PASS |
| iconColorShape uses PropsTokenColorsCore | PASS |
| Token values are valid design system tokens | PASS |
| invoiceList() has explicit return type | PASS |
| No implicit any types | PASS |
| No unsafe type assertions | PASS |
| View props match expected types | PASS |
| Consistency with InvoiceCashbackOnboarding | PASS |

**Overall Assessment:** The InvoiceCashbackPoints screen is type-safe. All color properties correctly use the `PropsTokenColorsCore` type with valid design system token names (`'BRAND_BASE_01'`, `'INTENSE_COLOR_01'`), not hex color values. The implementation is consistent with the InvoiceCashbackOnboarding screen.
